title: Translate the public synthesis into additional languages (community-reviewed)
context: Backlog: broaden reach by translating the public CC-BY synthesis into additional languages, each community-reviewed, with provenance preserved. The specific target languages are not yet enumerated (they depend on the secured audience/community), so this is a representative task that expands per-language once an audience and reviewers are confirmed - no languages are fabricated here.
objective: Translate the published public synthesis into one additional language (representative; expands per-language on audience/reviewer confirmation), community-reviewed, preserving provenance and citations, and licensed source-compatibly (CC-BY-4.0, matching the CC-BY source).
acceptanceCriteria: Translates the published synthesis into one target language with provenance and citations preserved intact
The translation is reviewed by a fluent community reviewer for accuracy and fidelity before publication
Licensed CC-BY-4.0 (source-compatible with the CC-BY-4.0 source synthesis); no relicensing of any source
Target language(s) are confirmed with the audience/community before fan-out; this row expands to one task per confirmed language (no languages fabricated in advance)
